temperature.tooltip: Controls randomness: Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.

topP.tooltip: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling: 0.5 means half of all likelihood-weighted options are considered.

evaluators.title: Evaluators

text.title: Evaluate Result (Text Based)
text.description: Set of Evaluators to evaluate the result of a Chatflow.

json.title: Evaluate Result (JSON)
json.description: Set of Evaluators to evaluate the JSON response of a Chatflow.

numeric.title: Evaluate Metrics (Numeric)
numeric.description: Set of Evaluators that evaluate the metrics (latency, tokens, cost, length of response) of a Chatflow.

llm.title: LLM based Grading (JSON)
llm.description: Post execution, grades the answers by using an LLM.

containsAny.title: Contains Any
containsAny.description: Returns true if any of the specified comma separated values are present in the response.

containsAll.title: Contains All
containsAll.description: Returns true if ALL of the specified comma separated values are present in the response.

doesNotContainAny.title: Does Not Contains Any
doesNotContainAny.description: Returns true if any of the specified comma separated values are present in the response.

doesNotContainAll.title: Does Not Contains All
doesNotContainAll.description: Returns true if ALL of the specified comma separated values are present in the response.

startsWith.title: Starts With
startsWith.description: Returns true if the response starts with the specified value.

notStartsWith.title: Does Not Start With
notStartsWith.description: Returns true if the response does not start with the specified value.

isValidJSON.title: Is Valid JSON
isValidJSON.description: Returns true if the response is a valid JSON.

isNotValidJSON.title: Is Not a Valid JSON
isNotValidJSON.description: Returns true if the response is a not a valid JSON.

totalTokens.title: Total Tokens
totalTokens.description: Sum of Prompt Tokens and Completion Tokens.

promptTokens.title: Prompt Tokens
promptTokens.description: This is the number of tokens in your prompt.

completionTokens.title: Completion Tokens
completionTokens.description: Completion tokens are any tokens that the model generates in response to your input.

apiLatency.title: Total API Latency
apiLatency.description: Total time taken for the Flowise Prediction API call (milliseconds).

chain.title: Chatflow Latency
chain.description: Actual time spent in executing the chatflow (milliseconds).

responseLength.title: Output Chars Length
responseLength.description: Number of characters in the response.

outputSchema.title: Output Schema
outputSchema.tooltip1: What is the output format in JSON?
outputSchema.tooltip2: Instruct the LLM to give formatted JSON output

signup.auth0: Sign Up With Auth0 by Okta

roles.title: Roles
roles.removeUsersFirst: Remove users with the role from Workspace first

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: External functions or APIs the agent can use to take action

howToUse.title: How To Use Function
howToUse.youCan: You can use any libraries imported in Flowise
howToUse.propUse: You can use properties specified in Input Schema as variables with prefix $:
howToUse.deafultConfig: You can get default flow config:
howToUse.return: Must return a string value at the end of function

tools.error: Invalid JSON format. Please check your input.

toolName.title: Tool Name
toolName.tooltip: Tool name must be small capital letter with underscore. Ex: my_tool

toolDescription.title: Tool description
toolDescription.tooltip: Description of what the tool does. This is for ChatGPT to determine when to use this tool.

inputSchema.title: Input Schema
inputSchema.tooltip: What is the input format in JSON?

jsFunction.title: Javascript Function
jsFunction.tooltip: Function to execute when tool is being used. You can use properties specified in Input Schema as variables. For example, if the property is userid, you can use as $userid. Return value must be a string. You can also override the code from API by following this guide

users.title: User Management
users.error: Cannot change status of the organization owner!

static.title: Static
static.description: Variable value will be read from the value entered below

runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.description: Variable value will be read from .env file

help.title: How To Use Variables
help.ifElse: Variables can be used in Custom Tool, Custom Function, Custom Loader, If Else Function with the $ prefix.
help.sysmessage: Variables can also be used in Text Field parameter of any node. For example, in System Message of Agent:
help.static: If variable type is Static, the value will be retrieved as it is. If variable type is Runtime, the value will be retrieved from .env file.
help.override: You can also override variable values in API overrideConfig using vars:

vectorStore.note: For security reason, override config is disabled by default. You can change this by going into Chatflow Configuration -> Security tab, and enable the property you want to override.
vectorStore.specify: You can also specify multiple values for a config parameter by specifying the node id

added.title: Added
added.tooltip: Number of vector embeddings added to Vector Store

updated.title: Updated
updated.tooltip: Updated existing vector embeddings. Only works when a Record Manager is connected to the Vector Store

skipped.title: Skipped
skipped.tooltip: Number of same vector embeddings that exists, and were skipped re-upserting again. Only works when a Record Manager is connected to the Vector Store

deleted.title: Deleted
deleted.tooltip: Deleted vector embeddings. Only works when a Record Manager with a Cleanup method is connected to the Vector Store

upsertClicked.success: Succesfully upserted vector store. You can start chatting now!

delete.title: Delete Workspace {{name}}
delete.description: This is irreversible and will remove all associated data inside the workspace. Are you sure you want to delete?

remove.title: Remove Users
remove.description:
Remove the following users from the workspace?
{{users}}

error.reserved: Workspace name cannot be Default Workspace or Personal Workspace - this is a reserved name

errors.failed: Organization owner cannot be removed from workspace.
